step_by_step_default.description: Prefer diagnose/explain first, then ask before acting.

ask_before_implementing.description: Ask for approval before making code or file changes.

ask_before_file_edits.description: Pause before editing files unless the user explicitly asked to proceed.

prefer_diagnose_first.description: Start with diagnosis, explanation, and options instead of jumping to fixes.

allow_autofix.description: Permit automatic fixes without asking first.

verbosity.description: How detailed the assistant should be when explaining options and decisions.
